title: Weighted Random Feature
description: Randomly selects and places a feature based on a weight value. Weights are relative, with higher values making selection more likely.

weighted_random_feature_definition.title: Weighted Random Feature Definition
weighted_random_feature_definition.description: A single Weighted Random Feature Definition.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

features.description: Collection of weighted features to randomly select from.

items.description: A feature and its weight [feature_identifier, weight].

prefixItems.description: Weight for this feature (relative to other weights).
